name_en: Jean Cocteau Museum – Séverin Wunderman Collection
name_local: Musée Jean Cocteau – Collection Séverin Wunderman

phrases.french: Un billet adulte, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.phonetic: un bee-YEH ad-ULT, seel voo PLAY
phrases.context: The museum holds the world's largest Cocteau collection — over 1,800 works donated by American collector Séverin Wunderman.

phrases.french: Où sont les œuvres de Cocteau lui-même ?
phrases.phonetic: oo son lay UH-vruh duh kok-TOH lwee-MEM
phrases.context: The permanent collection spans paintings, drawings, ceramics, and tapestries made by Cocteau during his time in Menton.

phrases.french: Est-ce que le Bastion est inclus dans le billet ?
phrases.english: Is the Bastion included in the ticket?
phrases.phonetic: es-kuh luh bas-TYON eh an-KLOO don luh bee-YEH
phrases.context: The old harbour Bastion — decorated by Cocteau himself — is a separate annex of the museum, worth visiting for the mosaics.

tips: Also visit the Bastion du Vieux Port — a small harbour fort Cocteau decorated with mosaics, included with some ticket types
Jean Cocteau lived in Menton and decorated the Salle des Mariages in the town hall — also worth a visit (small fee)
